calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Apr-21-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Alkazin for Camillo Borruso.

Counsel presented oral argument to support his position with regard to the Fairfax property, the $200,000.00 to Dennis and the $200,000.00 to James not being specific gifts, and spoke of the Decedent's intent. In addition, Mr. Alkazin stated that the gross income from the three properties (two San Francisco properties and one Marin County Property) can provide for the $2,500.00 monthly distribution to the three Beneficiaries and that there is no accounting as to the calculations with regard to the property owned with the Sister. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-30-2011 Continued To Apr-13-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-16-2011 Continued To Mar-30-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (162 Lunado Court, San Francisco, California)
Off Calendar Dec-15-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Alkazin for Camillo Borruso.

The sale was confirmed at $870,000.00. The sale will be subject to the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the petition (signing the order for the same in open court). Bond is not required.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Arlene CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-25-2010 Granted Per Written Order
